image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about alcohol sleep quality.
Context visual: Many think alcohol helps them sleep, but the reality is more complex.
Escalation visual: Research shows it can disrupt REM sleep, the phase crucial for restoration.
Evidence visual: Studies indicate that even low amounts can reduce overall sleep quality.
Payoff visual: So, while a drink may help you fall asleep, you'll likely wake up feeling worse.
Cta visual: Want to improve your sleep? Consider cutting back on alcohol. Follow for more science insights!
